name: CRM Marketing
description: Public marketing landing page for the AI-native CRM. Showcases AI-powered sales features, pipeline management, pricing, and customer testimonials with strong conversion CTAs.

page_briefs.home: Conversion-focused CRM landing page. Opens with a split hero — bold headline and subhead on the left, product screenshot showing the AI pipeline board on the right, with primary and secondary CTA buttons. Scrolls into a feature grid showcasing AI enrichment, smart pipeline, meeting intelligence, and email assist. Testimonials section displays customer quotes in a three-column card layout. Pricing presents starter, professional, and enterprise tiers. Closes with a full-width CTA section encouraging free trial sign-up.
